chunks.text: Technical Reports - Natacha Crooks. Extending Delayed Fair Sharing: A Generalizable Framework for Multi-Resource Performance Isolation (EECS-2025-97). Authors: James DeLoye, Tyler Griggs, Dev Bali, Wenjie Ma, Audrey Cheng, Jae Hong, Soujanya Ponnapalli, Natacha Crooks, Scott Shenker, Ion Stoica and Matei Zaharia.
BeeGees: Stayin' Alive in Chained BFT. Authors: Neil Giridharan, Florian Suri-Payer, Matthew Ding, Heidi Howard, Ittai Abraham and Natacha Crooks.
